owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

depositNFT(address,uint256,bytes32,uint2.notice: Deposit an NFT into the vault to create a collateral position.

emergencyWithdraw(address,uint256,addres.notice: Emergency withdrawal by admin (for stuck NFTs only).

getPosition(uint256).notice: Get details of a specific position.

getPositionsByOwner(address).notice: Get all position IDs owned by an address.

isPositionActive(uint256).notice: Check if a position is currently active (locked).

isPositionUnlocked(uint256).notice: Check if a position has been unlocked for withdrawal.

totalPositions().notice: Get the total number of positions created.

unlockPosition(uint256).notice: Mark a position as eligible for withdrawal (called by authorized oracle/relayer).

withdrawNFT(uint256).notice: Withdraw an NFT after the loan has been repaid and position unlocked.
